title: System configuration schema
description: Look up the live system configuration JSON Schema—definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples—on a stable deep-linkable docs route.

howToAccess.title: Local storage and access
howToAccess.body: Operator system configuration lives at ~/.you-agent-factory/config.json. Create that file with you config init, or open and edit it on disk, when you need operator-wide settings for the factory runtime.

schemaLookup.title: Schema Lookup
schemaLookup.body: Browse the complete System configuration schema below: root fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples. Follow $ref links to related definitions, and copy deep links to any definition or field anchor.
